patch.value: Extend pm package init --declarative to the full capability matrix (hooks/search/importers/schema/renderers/parser/preflight/services)

Follow-up to the commands-only --declarative blueprint starter (pm-8mxg). Generalize the declarative scaffold so every --capability variant can emit its composeExtension(blueprint) form (mapping each surface to its ExtensionBlueprint field: hooks->hooks.afterCommand, search->searchProviders/vectorStoreAdapters, importers->importers/exporters, schema->itemTypes/itemFields/migrations, renderers->renderers record, parser->parsers record, preflight->preflights, services->services record) plus the matching author-time assertExtensionPreflight test. Requires a shared per-capability registration-definition builder so the imperative activate body and the declarative blueprint stay in lockstep (the current README define* snippet uses simplified run bodies that do not match the real registrations, so it cannot be reused verbatim). Scoped out of pm-8mxg to keep that PR focused, reviewable, and 100%-coverable.
